title: Corporate domain events
description: Published events from corporate-service via the transactional outbox (Kafka topic pss.corporate.events, message key = accountId). Consumers MUST be idempotent on eventId. This schema follows the ON-THE-WIRE envelope built in PolicyCompliantBookingService.publishBookingCreated: the JSON discriminator key is `type` (the DB column is event_type — the wire uses `type`), and `version` is the integer 1 (a deviation from the platform string "1"). Exactly ONE event type is emitted by the whole service.

PolicyStatus.description: Policy outcome stamped on the booking. On this event only COMPLIANT / ADVISORY appear (a VIOLATION blocks before a booking exists).

EventEnvelope.description: Common envelope carried by every corporate domain event. NOTE: no accountId / memberId / correlationId at envelope level — accountId lives in the payload.

eventId.description: Unique event identifier; consumers deduplicate on this.

type.description: Discriminator constant. Wire JSON key is `type` (DB column is event_type).

version.description: Schema version. Integer 1 (NOT the string "1" other modules use).

tenantId.description: Tenant that owns the account (from the verified token).

accountId.description: Corporate account identifier (also the Kafka message key).

costCentreCode.description: Cost-centre business code tagged on the order.
